creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

In order to process this request we would need some more information. 
Would it be possible to send in an entry similar to the other entries in 
the user group list (http://www.FreeBSD.org/usergroups.html). Especially 
including a link or contact information?

Regards

jkois

-- 
  Johann Kois
  jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
  FreeBSD Documentation Project
  FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
